+<!DOCTYPE html>
+<html lang="en">
+<head>
+  <meta charset="UTF-8">
+  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
+  <title>Research Engine</title>
+  <style>
+    body{margin:0;background:#07090b;color:#d1d5db;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif}
+    .wrap{max-width:1080px;margin:0 auto;padding:28px 16px 60px}
+    .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:18px}
+    .panel{background:#101827;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:12px;padding:14px}
+    .card{display:block;color:#d1d5db;text-decoration:none;border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:10px}
+    .cluster{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
+    .chip{border:1px solid #1f2937;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 10px;cursor:pointer}
+    .chip.active{border-color:#14b8a6;color:#14b8a6}
+    svg{width:100%;height:320px;background:#0b1220;border-radius:10px}
+  </style>
+</head>
+<body>
+  <div class="wrap">
+    <h1>Research</h1>
+    <div class="cluster" id="clusters"></div>
+    <div class="grid" style="margin-top:14px;">
+      <div class="panel">
+        <h3>Scrollable article cards</h3>
+        <input id="search" placeholder="Search title, tags, content, concepts" style="width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #1f2937;background:#0b1220;color:#d1d5db;">
+        <div id="cards" style="max-height:520px;overflow:auto;margin-top:12px;"></div>
+      </div>
+      <div class="panel">
+        <h3>Concept graph</h3>
+        <svg id="graph"></svg>
+      </div>
+    </div>
+  </div>
+<script>
+(async function () {
+  const clusters = ['All', 'AI', 'zayvora', 'ViaDecide', 'Commerce', 'Knowledge systems'];
+  const clusterEl = document.getElementById('clusters');
+  const cardsEl = document.getElementById('cards');
+  const searchEl = document.getElementById('search');
+  const graphEl = document.getElementById('graph');
+  let selected = 'All';
+  let articles = [];
+  let graph = [];
+
+  clusterEl.innerHTML = clusters.map((c) => `<button class="chip" data-tag="${c}">${c}</button>`).join('');
+  const chips = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.chip'));
+
+  function rank(article, query){
+    if (!query) return 1;
+    const q = query.toLowerCase();
+    let score = 0;
+    if ((article.title || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)) score += 5;
+    if ((article.description || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)) score += 3;
+    if ((article.tags || []).join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q)) score += 4;
+    if ((article.concepts || []).join(' ').toLowerCase().includes(q)) score += 4;
+    if ((article.content || '').toLowerCase().includes(q)) score += 2;
+    return score;
+  }
+
+  function renderCards() {
+    const q = searchEl.value.trim();
+    const filtered = articles
+      .filter((a) => selected === 'All' || (a.tags || []).some((t) => String(t).toLowerCase() === selected.toLowerCase()))
+      .map((a) => ({ article: a, score: rank(a, q) }))
+      .filter((x) => !q || x.score > 0)
+      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score || (a.article.date < b.article.date ? 1 : -1));
+
+    cardsEl.innerHTML = filtered.map(({ article }) => `
+      <a class="card" href="../${article.path.replace(/^\//, '')}">
+        <small>${article.date || ''}</small>
+        <h4>${article.title}</h4>
+        <p>${article.summary || article.description || ''}</p>
+      </a>
+    `).join('') || '<p>No matching articles found.</p>';
+  }
+
+  function renderGraph() {
+    const width = graphEl.clientWidth || 400;
+    const height = 320;
+    const nodes = graph.slice(0, 12);
+    const radius = 120;
+    const centerX = width / 2;
+    const centerY = height / 2;
+    const points = nodes.map((n, i) => ({
+      slug: n.node,
+      x: centerX + Math.cos((Math.PI * 2 * i) / Math.max(nodes.length, 1)) * radius,
+      y: centerY + Math.sin((Math.PI * 2 * i) / Math.max(nodes.length, 1)) * radius
+    }));
+
+    const getPoint = (slug) => points.find((p) => p.slug === slug);
+    const lines = [];
+    for (const n of nodes) {
+      const from = getPoint(n.node);
+      for (const rel of (n.related || []).slice(0, 2)) {
+        const to = getPoint(rel);
+        if (from && to) lines.push(`<line x1="${from.x}" y1="${from.y}" x2="${to.x}" y2="${to.y}" stroke="#334155" />`);
+      }
+    }
+
+    const circles = points.map((p) => `<g><circle cx="${p.x}" cy="${p.y}" r="8" fill="#14b8a6" /><text x="${p.x + 10}" y="${p.y + 4}" fill="#cbd5e1" font-size="10">${p.slug.slice(0, 18)}</text></g>`);
+    graphEl.innerHTML = [...lines, ...circles].join('');
+  }
+
+  chips.forEach((chip, i) => {
+    if (i === 0) chip.classList.add('active');
+    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
+      selected = chip.dataset.tag;
+      chips.forEach((c) => c.classList.toggle('active', c === chip));
+      renderCards();
+    });
+  });
+  searchEl.addEventListener('input', renderCards);
+
+  const [articlesRes, graphRes] = await Promise.all([
+    fetch('../data/articles.json', { cache: 'no-store' }),
+    fetch('../data/knowledge_graph.json', { cache: 'no-store' })
+  ]);
+  articles = await articlesRes.json();
+  graph = await graphRes.json();
+  renderCards();
+  renderGraph();
+})();
+</script>
+</body>
+</html>

@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env -S node --experimental-strip-types
+const fs = require('fs');
+const path = require('path');
+
+const repoRoot = path.resolve(__dirname, '..');
+const articlesPath = path.join(repoRoot, 'data', 'articles.json');
+const graphPath = path.join(repoRoot, 'data', 'knowledge_graph.json');
+
+function jaccard(a, b) {
+  const A = new Set(a);
+  const B = new Set(b);
+  const inter = [...A].filter((x) => B.has(x)).length;
+  const union = new Set([...A, ...B]).size;
+  return union ? inter / union : 0;
+}
+
+function buildGraph() {
+  const articles = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(articlesPath, 'utf8'));
+  const graph = articles.map((article) => {
+    const scored = articles
+      .filter((other) => other.slug !== article.slug)
+      .map((other) => {
+        const tagScore = jaccard(article.tags || [], other.tags || []);
+        const conceptScore = jaccard(article.concepts || [], other.concepts || []);
+        const semantic = jaccard((article.content || '').toLowerCase().split(/\W+/).filter(Boolean), (other.content || '').toLowerCase().split(/\W+/).filter(Boolean));
+        return {
+          slug: other.slug,
+          score: (tagScore * 0.5) + (conceptScore * 0.3) + (semantic * 0.2)
+        };
+      })
+      .filter((x) => x.score > 0)
+      .sort((a, b) => b.score - a.score)
+      .slice(0, 5)
+      .map((x) => x.slug);
+
+    return {
+      node: article.slug,
+      related: scored
+    };
+  });
+
+  fs.writeFileSync(graphPath, JSON.stringify(graph, null, 2) + '\n');
+  console.log(`Built graph with ${graph.length} nodes.`);
+}
+
+buildGraph();

+#!/usr/bin/env -S node --experimental-strip-types
+const fs = require('fs');
+const path = require('path');
+const { execSync } = require('child_process');
+
+const repoRoot = path.resolve(__dirname, '..');
+const outputPath = path.join(repoRoot, 'data', 'articles.json');
+const requiredRoots = ['articles', 'newsletters', 'zayvora', 'blog'];
+const fallbackRoots = ['.'];
+const allowedExt = new Set(['.md', '.mdx', '.html']);
+const ignoredPaths = new Set([
+  'index.html',
+  'research/index.html',
+  'profile/dharam-daxini/index.html',
+  'about/dharam-daxini/index.html',
+  'zayvora/index.html'
+]);
+const stopwords = new Set(['the','and','for','that','with','this','from','into','your','you','are','was','were','been','have','has','had','about','then','than','they','their','but','not','all','any','can','our','out','how']);
+
+function walk(dir, collector) {
+  if (!fs.existsSync(dir)) return;
+  for (const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true })) {
+    if (['.git', 'data', 'scripts', 'tests', 'node_modules'].includes(entry.name)) continue;
+    const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);
+    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
+      walk(fullPath, collector);
+      continue;
+    }
+    const ext = path.extname(entry.name).toLowerCase();
+    if (!allowedExt.has(ext)) continue;
+    const relativePath = path.relative(repoRoot, fullPath).replaceAll(path.sep, '/');
+    if (!ignoredPaths.has(relativePath)) collector.add(relativePath);
+  }
+}
+
+function parseFrontmatter(raw) {
+  const trimmed = raw.trimStart();
+  if (!trimmed.startsWith('---')) return {};
+  const end = trimmed.indexOf('\n---', 3);
+  if (end === -1) return {};
+  const block = trimmed.slice(3, end).trim();
+  const meta = {};
+  for (const line of block.split('\n')) {
+    const m = line.match(/^([a-zA-Z_][\w-]*):\s*(.*)$/);
+    if (!m) continue;
+    const key = m[1].toLowerCase();
+    let value = m[2].trim();
+    if (value.startsWith('[') && value.endsWith(']')) {
+      value = value.slice(1, -1).split(',').map((x) => x.trim().replace(/^['"]|['"]$/g, '')).filter(Boolean);
+    } else {
+      value = value.replace(/^['"]|['"]$/g, '');
+    }
+    meta[key] = value;
+  }
+  return meta;
+}
+
+function parseHtmlMeta(raw) {
+  const meta = {};
+  const title = raw.match(/<title>([^<]+)<\/title>/i);
+  if (title) meta.title = title[1].trim();
+  const description = raw.match(/<meta\s+(?:name|property)=['"](?:description|og:description)['"]\s+content=['"]([^'"]+)['"]/i)
+    || raw.match(/<meta\s+content=['"]([^'"]+)['"]\s+(?:name|property)=['"](?:description|og:description)['"]/i);
+  if (description) meta.description = description[1].trim();
+  return meta;
+}
+
+function stripContent(raw, ext) {
+  if (ext === '.html') {
+    return raw
+      .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, ' ')
+      .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, ' ')
+      .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
+      .replace(/ /g, ' ')
+      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
+      .trim();
+  }
+  return raw
+    .replace(/^---[\s\S]*?---/m, ' ')
+    .replace(/`{3}[\s\S]*?`{3}/g, ' ')
+    .replace(/[#>*_\[\]\(\)-]/g, ' ')
+    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
+    .trim();
+}
+
+function inferTitle(rel) {
+  const base = path.basename(rel, path.extname(rel));
+  return base.replace(/[-_]+/g, ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, (c) => c.toUpperCase());
+}
+
+function slugify(input) {
+  return input.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
+}
+
+function inferDate(rel) {
+  try {
+    const out = execSync(`git log --diff-filter=A --format=%cs -- "${rel}" | tail -n 1`, {
+      cwd: repoRoot,
+      stdio: ['ignore', 'pipe', 'ignore'],
+      encoding: 'utf8'
+    }).trim();
+    return out || new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
+  } catch {
+    return new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
+  }
+}
+
+function keywordConcepts(text) {
+  const words = text.toLowerCase().match(/[a-z][a-z-]{3,}/g) || [];
+  const counts = new Map();
+  for (const word of words) {
+    if (stopwords.has(word)) continue;
+    counts.set(word, (counts.get(word) || 0) + 1);
+  }
+  return [...counts.entries()]
+    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
+    .slice(0, 12)
+    .map(([w]) => w);
+}
+
+function normalizeTags(tagsValue, title, rel, content) {
+  const raw = Array.isArray(tagsValue) ? tagsValue : typeof tagsValue === 'string' ? tagsValue.split(',') : [];
+  const tags = new Set(raw.map((t) => String(t).trim()).filter(Boolean));
+  const haystack = `${title} ${rel} ${content}`.toLowerCase();
+  if (haystack.includes('zayvora')) tags.add('zayvora');
+  if (haystack.includes('viadecide') || haystack.includes('via decide')) tags.add('ViaDecide');
+  if (haystack.includes('ai') || haystack.includes('model') || haystack.includes('llm')) tags.add('AI');
+  if (haystack.includes('commerce') || haystack.includes('bharat')) tags.add('Commerce');
+  if (haystack.includes('knowledge') || haystack.includes('graph') || haystack.includes('research')) tags.add('Knowledge systems');
+  if (haystack.includes('daxini')) tags.add('The Daxini Stack');
+  return [...tags];
+}
+
+function discover() {
+  const files = new Set();
+  for (const root of requiredRoots) walk(path.join(repoRoot, root), files);
+  if (!files.size) {
+    for (const root of fallbackRoots) walk(path.join(repoRoot, root), files);
+  }
+
+  const rows = [];
+  for (const rel of [...files].sort()) {
+    const full = path.join(repoRoot, rel);
+    const ext = path.extname(rel).toLowerCase();
+    const raw = fs.readFileSync(full, 'utf8');
+    const frontmatter = parseFrontmatter(raw);
+    const htmlMeta = ext === '.html' ? parseHtmlMeta(raw) : {};
+    const content = stripContent(raw, ext);
+    const firstParagraph = content.split(/\.\s+/).slice(0, 2).join('. ').trim();
+
+    const title = frontmatter.title || htmlMeta.title || inferTitle(rel);
+    const tags = normalizeTags(frontmatter.tags, title, rel, content);
+
+    rows.push({
+      title,
+      slug: slugify(frontmatter.slug || title),
+      date: frontmatter.date || inferDate(rel),
+      author: frontmatter.author || 'Dharam Daxini',
+      tags,
+      description: frontmatter.description || htmlMeta.description || firstParagraph.slice(0, 220),
+      summary: firstParagraph.slice(0, 320),
+      concepts: keywordConcepts(`${title} ${content}`),
+      content,
+      path: `/${rel}`
+    });
+  }
+
+  rows.sort((a, b) => (a.date < b.date ? 1 : -1));
+  fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(outputPath), { recursive: true });
+  fs.writeFileSync(outputPath, JSON.stringify(rows, null, 2) + '\n');
+  console.log(`Discovered ${rows.length} articles.`);
+}
+
+discover();

+(async function knowledgeEnhancer() {
+  const currentPath = '/' + window.location.pathname.split('/').slice(-2).join('/');
+  const [articlesRes, graphRes] = await Promise.all([
+    fetch('../data/articles.json', { cache: 'no-store' }),

+  ]);
+  const articles = await articlesRes.json();
+  const graph = await graphRes.json();
+  const current = articles.find((a) => a.path.endsWith(currentPath));
+  if (!current) return;
+
+  const node = graph.find((g) => g.node === current.slug) || { related: [] };
+  const related = node.related.map((slug) => articles.find((a) => a.slug === slug)).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 5);
+
+  const section = document.createElement('section');
+  section.style.marginTop = '48px';
+  section.innerHTML = '<h2>Related Articles</h2>';
+  for (const article of related) {

+    a.href = '../' + article.path.replace(/^\//, '');
+    a.style.display = 'block';
+    a.style.margin = '10px 0';
+    a.textContent = article.title;
+    section.appendChild(a);
+  }
+  document.querySelector('.container, .article, body').appendChild(section);
+
+  const conceptTargets = {
+    'local-first ai': '/articles/local-first-ai',
+    'knowledge graph': '/articles/knowledge-graph',
+    'zayvora': '/zayvora/'
+  };
+  const blockSelector = 'p, li';
+  document.querySelectorAll(blockSelector).forEach((el) => {
+    let html = el.innerHTML;
+    for (const phrase in conceptTargets) {
+      const re = new RegExp('\\b' + phrase.replace(/[-/\^$*+?.()|[\]{}]/g, '\\$&') + '\b', 'ig');
+      html = html.replace(re, (m) => `<a href="..${conceptTargets[phrase]}">${m}</a>`);
+    }
+    el.innerHTML = html;
+  });
+})();

title: feat: auto-discover and render articles from generated index
body:
### Motivation
- Fix missing content by making article discovery automatic so any new article file appears in the UI without code edits. 
- Cover common article locations (`/articles`, `/newsletters`, `/zayvora`, `/blog`) and supported formats (`.md`, `.mdx`, `.html`).
- Ensure reasonable metadata even when frontmatter is absent by inferring title/date/author/tags.

### Description
- Added an index generator `scripts/generate_articles_index.js` that scans the repo, parses frontmatter or HTML meta, infers missing `title`, `date` (from `git`), `author` (default `Dharam Daxini`) and tags, then writes `data/articles.json`.
- Updated the homepage (`index.html`) to load `data/articles.json` at runtime and render article cards with title, description, date, author and tags, plus client-side search and filter chips (`Zayvora`, `ViaDecide`, `AI`, `Research`).
- Added dedicated listing pages `zayvora/index.html` and `about/dharam-daxini/index.html` that automatically surface tag-matched articles from the same JSON index.
- Added build/test automation: `scripts/build.sh` runs the generator and the verification test, and `tests/verify-articles-index.js` ensures every discoverable article file is present in `data/articles.json`.

### Testing
- Ran `node scripts/generate_articles_index.js` which produced `data/articles.json` successfully. (Passed)
- Ran `node tests/verify-articles-index.js` to verify every discoverable article is indexed. (Passed)
- Executed the combined build `bash scripts/build.sh` to run generation + verification. (Passed)
- Performed static checks `node --check` on the new JS test/generator files. (Passed)
